mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.BBS_ID) FROM TB_BBS_MASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM004' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) B ON A.BBS_TY_CODE = B.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM009' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) C ON A.BBS_ATTRB_CODE = C.CODE WHERE 1=1
AND A.USE_AT = #{useAt}
AND A.BBS_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'
AND B.CODE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'

SELECT A.BBS_ID , A.BBS_TY_CODE , B.CODE_NM AS BBS_TY_CODE_NM , A.BBS_INTRCN , A.BBS_ATTRB_CODE , C.CODE_NM AS BBS_ATTRB_CODE_NM , A.BBS_NM , A.TMPLAT_ID , D.TMPLAT_NM , D.TMPLAT_COURS , A.FILE_ATCH_POSBL_AT , A.ATCH_POSBL_FILE_NUMBER , A.ATCH_POSBL_FILE_SIZE , A.REPLY_POSBL_AT , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID , E.USER_NM AS FRST_REGISTER_NM , A.USE_AT , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM , ( SELECT NVL(USE_AT, 'N') FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND TRGET_ID IN (#{uniqId}, 'SYSTEM_DEFAULT_BOARD') ) AS AUTH_FLAG FROM TB_BBS_MASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM004' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) B ON A.BBS_TY_CODE = B.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM009' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) C ON A.BBS_ATTRB_CODE = C.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_TMPLAT_INFO D ON A.TMPLAT_ID = D.TMPLAT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN VW_USER_MASTER E ON A.FRST_REGISTER_ID = E.ESNTL_ID WHERE A.BBS_ID = #{bbsId}
SELECT BBS_ID , BBS_TY_CODE , BBS_ATTRB_CODE , BBS_NM , TMPLAT_ID FROM TB_BBS_MASTER WHERE USE_AT = 'Y'

SELECT A.BBS_ID , A.BBS_TY_CODE , A.BBS_ATTRB_CODE , A.BBS_NM , A.TMPLAT_ID FROM TB_BBS_MASTER A , TB_BBS_USE B WHERE A.BBS_ID = B.BBS_ID AND B.TRGET_ID = #{trgetId} AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' AND B.USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY A.BBS_ID

SELECT /* TODO: 컬럼 명시 필요 */ * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RN , TB.* FROM ( SELECT A.BBS_ID , A.BBS_TY_CODE , B.CODE_NM AS BBS_TY_CODE_NM , A.BBS_ATTRB_CODE , C.CODE_NM AS BBS_ATTRB_CODE_NM , A.BBS_NM , A.TMPLAT_ID , A.USE_AT , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM TB_BBS_MASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM004' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) B ON A.BBS_TY_CODE = B.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM009' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) C ON A.BBS_ATTRB_CODE = C.CODE WHERE A.USE_AT = 'Y' AND A.BBS_ID NOT IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' )
AND A.BBS_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'
AND B.CODE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC ) TB ) WHERE RN BETWEEN #{firstIndex} + 1 AND #{firstIndex} + #{recordCountPerPage}

SELECT COUNT(A.BBS_ID) FROM TB_BBS_MASTER A LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM004' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) B ON A.BBS_TY_CODE = B.CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT CODE_ID , CODE , CODE_NM FROM TB_CMMN_DETAIL_CODE WHERE CODE_ID = 'COM009' AND USE_AT = 'Y' ) C ON A.BBS_ATTRB_CODE = C.CODE WHERE A.USE_AT = 'Y' AND A.BBS_ID NOT IN ( SELECT BBS_ID FROM TB_BBS_USE WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' )
AND A.BBS_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'
AND B.CODE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWrd} || '%'
